questionHtml:
Which equation represents the bond enthalpy for H–Br in hydrogen bromide?

A.  HBr (g) → H+ (g) + Br− (g)

B.  HBr (g) → H (g) + Br (g)

C.  HBr (g) → 12H2 (g) + 12Br2 (l)

D.  HBr (g) → 12H2 (g) + 12Br2 (g)

meta.title: Which equation represents the bond enthalpy for H–Br in hydrogen bromide? A. HBr (g) → H+ (g) + Br− (g) B. HBr (g) → H (g) + Br (g) C. HBr (g) → 12H2 (g) + 12Br2 (l) D. HBr (g) → 1
